name: us-sanctions-zhejiang-monitoring
description: Collect, normalize, and compare U.S. sanctions and control-list records for Chinese or Zhejiang-linked people and entities, with strict list-type separation and traceable source links.

compatible_with.install_hint: Import or paste work-buddy/skill.md into the Work Buddy custom skill or agent-instruction interface.
Use universal/US_SANCTIONS_ZHEJIANG_SKILL.md as a system or project instruction.
